name: flstudio-mcp-mac
description: macOS-first MCP bridge for FL Studio using CoreMIDI and FL Studio Python MIDI scripts.
long_description: Expose FL Studio transport, tempo, mixer, channel, MIDI file, and Piano Roll queue workflows to MCP clients. This extension runs locally on macOS and requires FL Studio's MIDI settings to connect the FLStudioMCP Request and Response virtual ports.

tools.name: fl_health
tools.description: Check the FL Studio bridge and return live project status when connected.

tools.name: fl_transport
tools.description: Control FL Studio transport playback, recording, mode, rewind, and metronome state.

tools.name: fl_set_tempo
tools.description: Set the current FL Studio project tempo.

tools.name: fl_mixer_tracks
tools.description: Read FL Studio mixer track names, volume, pan, mute, and solo state.

tools.name: fl_set_mixer_track
tools.description: Mutate a single FL Studio mixer track by explicit index.

tools.name: fl_channels
tools.description: Read FL Studio Channel Rack channel state.

tools.name: fl_set_channel
tools.description: Mutate a Channel Rack channel by explicit index.

tools.name: fl_create_midi_file
tools.description: Create a Standard MIDI file that can be imported into FL Studio.

tools.name: fl_queue_piano_roll_notes
tools.description: Queue notes for the included FL Studio Piano Roll script to apply.
